arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo told he 'doesn't know how to play football' by ex-Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has been slammed by a former Real Madrid player, who claims the striker 'doesn't know how to play football' despite being one of the game's leading stars

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Trent Alexander-Arnold 'can't turn down' Real Madrid as Curtis Jones shows true colours
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to take on West Ham in the Carabao Cup this evening, having lifted the trophy last season after beating Chelsea 1-0 after extra time in the final

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 3-2 Alaves: Los Blancos survive late scare to seal win
arts.sum: The Brazilian picked the ball up deep and charged at his defender, and just as it looked as if he had narrowed the angle too much, Rodrygo fizzed a delightful strike across goal and beyond Antonio Sivera. Carlo Ancelotti's side roared to a comfortable 3-0 lead and looked set to play out the simplest of victories, only for two late Alaves goals to leave them sweating as they battled through to victory.

arts.ttl: Alavés coach on Endrick kick-out: 'It's a red card'
arts.sum: Alavés coach Luis Garcia Plaza said Endrick should have been sent off in Real Madrid's 3-2 LaLiga win on Tuesday, after the teenage forward appeared to strike defender Santiago Mouriño with his knee in an off-the-ball challenge.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Real Madrid played very, very well for 60 minutes”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media after his team emerged 3-2 victors against Deportivo Alavés in La Liga on Tuesday night. Ancelotti on yellow cards for dissent

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 3 - 2 Alaves, Post-game, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani is joined by Sam Leveridge on his walk home from the Bernabeu to discuss: Kiyan is joined by Sam to discuss a rollercoaster of a game at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Real Madrid starlet Endrick escaped a red card for a shocking challenge vs Alavés
arts.sum: Real Madrid striker Endrick was extremely lucky to escape a red card in the club’s latest outing on Tuesday. As much came owing to the actions of the Brazilian late…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid man 'already been told' he will win the 2024 Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Vinicius Junior will take home the 2024 Ballon d'Or during its prize ceremony in Paris next month, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid boss Ancelotti provides Kylian Mbappé injury update
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has tonight provided an update on the wellbeing of star attacker Kylian Mbappé. This comes, for those who may have missed it, after Mbappé…

arts.ttl: “It’s a clear red card” – Alaves manager Luis Garcia Plaza furious with decision during Real Madrid defeat
arts.sum: Real Madrid edged their way to a fifth successive victory on Tuesday, as they saw off a brave fightback from Alaves at the Santiago Bernabeu. The visitors scored twice late on to make things interesting, and it could have been even more nervy had Endrick Felipe been shown a red card just before the goals.
